decks.notes: This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck aims to control the board early on with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Swords to Plowshares, while also applying pressure with powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory. The inclusion of Static Prison helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan, allowing the deck to maintain its aggressive tempo. The deck also includes utility lands like Wasteland and Karakas to further disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this combo deck is to quickly set up a powerful board presence by utilizing cards like Show and Tell, Dream Halls, and Omniscience to cheat big creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play. The deck includes cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Stock Up to help protect and support the combo pieces. With the ability to draw cards and counter spells with Brainstorm, Force of Will, and Flusterstorm, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a game-winning combo as quickly as possible.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful Eldrazi creatures to overwhelm the opponent and disrupt their game plan. By utilizing efficient creatures like Reality Smasher and Thought-Knot Seer, along with disruptive cards like Chalice of the Void and Thorn of Amethyst, the deck aims to apply pressure and control the game. The mana base is optimized to support the Eldrazi creatures, allowing for quick and explosive starts. Overall, the deck seeks to be proactive and aggressive, utilizing Eldrazi synergies to dominate the battlefield and secure victories.

The central theme of this deck is to utilize control elements along with the Stoneblade strategy to dominate the opponent. The deck focuses on powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Stoneforge Mystic to apply pressure while using counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares with strong card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory. Additionally, the inclusion of versatile cards like Prismatic Ending and Stifle adds flexibility to adapt to different situations.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a variety of spells and abilities to manage the board state and counter opponent's threats. It utilizes a combination of removal spells, counterspells, card draw, and powerful planeswalkers to maintain control of the game. The deck also has some ramp and card advantage engines to ensure it can keep up with the opponent's threats. Ultimately, the goal is to outvalue the opponent and win the game through superior card advantage and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to use artifacts, specifically blue ones, to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mishra's Bauble, the deck aims to generate card advantage and tempo advantage while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Force of Will and Pithing Needle. The key strategy revolves around combining artifact synergies with aggressive creatures to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing the powerful land Gaea's Cradle to generate massive amounts of mana and take control of the game. By ramping into creatures like Wight of the Reliquary and Craterhoof Behemoth, while disrupting the opponent with cards like Endurance and Collector Ouphe, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruption. The key is to efficiently utilize the Cradle to accelerate into game-winning plays while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive Eldrazi creatures while disrupting their game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer. The deck also utilizes fast mana acceleration with cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide to get ahead early in the game. The deck's land base is optimized to support the Eldrazi creatures with Ancient Tomb, Cavern of Souls, and Eye of Ugin. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to apply fast and relentless pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells and removal spells, while ramping into powerful threats such as Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storm. The deck also aims to generate mana quickly using Cloudpost lands and Tron lands to cast big spells like Eldrazi Confluence and Kozilek's Command. The goal is to outvalue the opponent and overwhelm them with powerful threats and disruptive spells, taking advantage of the high mana production and control elements of the deck.

The deck revolves around assembling the Dark Depths-Thespian's Stage combo to create a 20/20 indestructible creature in one turn. Cards like Crop Rotation and Green Sun's Zenith help find the combo pieces quickly, while cards like Swords to Plowshares and Reclaimers provide protection and flexibility. By efficiently tutoring for key pieces and disrupting opponents with land destruction, the deck aims to win the game through a powerful combo finish. The deck has a strong mana base and utilizes powerful Legacy staples to maintain consistency and resilience against a variety of strategies.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful threats such as dragons and disrupting the opponent's game plan with disruptive artifacts like Chalice of the Void and Blood Moon. The goal is to lock down the opponent's resources while efficiently dealing damage with aggressive creatures and burn spells. Using fast mana sources like Chrome Mox and Simian Spirit Guide, the deck aims to overpower the opponent before they can recover, leveraging cards like Fury and Sundering Eruption to clear the way for lethal attacks.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures to pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Endurance. The deck also utilizes powerful mana acceleration in cards like Noble Hierarch and Green Sun's Zenith to quickly ramp into bigger threats like Grist, the Hunger Tide and Wight of the Reliquary. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive game plan with access to various colors and utility lands like Wasteland and Bojuka Bog to disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The key concept of this deck is to generate mana quickly and efficiently using various fast mana sources like Chrome Mox, Lion's Eye Diamond, Lotus Petal, and Mox Opal, while using cards like Brainstorm, Dark Ritual, and Infernal Tutor to find and assemble the necessary combo pieces. The deck aims to win by casting Ad Nauseam to draw a large portion of the library, then use Tendrils of Agony or Burning Wish to finish the opponent off with a storm count. The deck also utilizes Wishclaw Talisman and Urza's Saga to tutor for key cards and further enhance its win condition.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to generate mana and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Dark Ritual, Cabal Ritual, and The Fantasticar, the deck can generate a large amount of mana early on. The deck also includes disruptive elements such as Duress and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The win condition revolves around using The One Ring and Fell the Profane to deal damage to the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to execute its combo efficiently and overwhelm the opponent before they can respond effectively.

The main concept of this deck is to efficiently generate mana and assemble various artifact pieces to create a powerful combo using cards like Mishra's Research Desk, Tezzeret, and Mystic Forge. The deck aims to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Mox Opal and Grim Monolith, while also using artifact synergy with cards like The Fantasticar and Voltaic Key. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Tormod's Crypt and Glaring Fleshraker to control the opponent's resources. The win condition is to establish a dominant board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful artifact-based abilities and spells.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing cards like Dress Down, Torpor Orb, and Phyrexian Dreadnought to disrupt your opponent's strategy. You can also generate card advantage with Nulldrifter and Stock Up, while protecting your key cards with counter spells like Force of Will. The deck aims to set up a lock on the board state and gradually grind out your opponent's resources, eventually overwhelming them with powerful threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Otawara, Soaring City.
